pr-evidence/harden-benchmark-measurement.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially found empty-message engine exceptions would become invalid measurements; added a non-empty exception fallback and regression test, then GPT-5.5 re-reviewed cleanly as safe to merge.
what_changed: Added producer-side validation for benchmark measurement traceability fields, output text type, optional answer/error strings, and metadata mapping.
Preserved non-aborting benchmark error measurements for empty-message engine exceptions by falling back to the exception type name.
pr-evidence/harden-benchmark-measurement.why: V1 benchmark artifacts should be generated from well-formed measurements before release evidence validates latency and quality results.
